brand_identity.name: Vigília
brand_identity.mission: Empowering Brazilian citizens with blockchain-verified political accountability.

primary.name: Neon Brazil Green
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Positive Trends, Verified Status

headings.usage: Page Titles, Section Headers, Big Stats

mono.usage: Wallet Addresses, Transaction Hashes, Code Snippets

effects.scanlines: background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.1), rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 2px);

buttons.primary: bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-500 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-8 py-3 transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,197,94,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-green-600/50 text-green-500 hover:bg-green-950/30 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-8 py-3

cards.base: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/10 p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-green-500/30 transition-colors
cards.feature: Use 'Tracing Beam' effect on hover. Add a subtle noise texture overlay.

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border-white/20 focus:border-green-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-green-500 rounded-none font-mono text-sm placeholder:text-zinc-600

badges.verified: bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border border-green-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase
badges.suspicious: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase
badges.neutral: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase

landing_page.hero_section: col-span-full h-[80vh] flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden

dashboard.sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 border-r border-white/10 bg-black/50 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to the top of /app/frontend/src/index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (neon green, alert yellow) and font families (Chivo, Inter, JetBrains Mono).
3. GLOBAL STYLES: Apply 'bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-50' to the body in index.css. Add a global '.scanlines' class for the background texture.
4. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: When using Shadcn components, strip the default 'rounded-md' and replace with 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm' for a stricter, more technical look.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts with the custom color palette. Ensure tooltips have the glassmorphism effect.
6. DATA-TESTID: Every interactive element (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='search-input').
7. MOCK DATA: Create a robust mock data file for 'Politicians', 'Transactions', and 'Alerts' since we don't have a real backend yet. Use Portuguese names for realism.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic gradients or centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark Mode Only: This app is strictly dark mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle.
Motion: Add 'hover:translate-x-1' to list items. Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions if possible.
Spacing: Use 'gap-6' or 'gap-8' for grids. Don't cram data.
Language: The UI text should be in English (as per standard dev practice) but the Content (names, descriptions) can be Portuguese/English hybrid or English for international showcase.
